## omqctl queue commit

Commit pulled items

### Synopsis

The 'queue commit' command commits (acknowledges) previously pulled items by their IDs.

```
omqctl queue commit <queue> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help         help for commit
      --ids string   Comma-separated list of item IDs to commit
```
